title: Fully Oxidized Copper Elytra
description: Ever wanted your copper elytra to be fully oxidized? Well this pack fixes that!
body:
Give your Minecraft elytra a sleek new look with the Fully Oxidized Copper Elytra Pack! (FOE for short)
This lightweight resource pack changes the elytra model and item texture to mimic the official copper cape design but changing it to be fully ozidized, giving you a more personalized flying experience.

Features:

- Redesigned elytra model

- Updated elytra item texture

- Lightweight and compatible with Minecraft 1.21+

- Works without any dependencies

Perfect for players who want their elytra to look stylish while soaring through the skies!
